<!--
Thanks for sending a PR! Read CONTRIBUTING.md if you haven't yet.
Keep this template — delete sections that genuinely don't apply.
-->

## Summary

<!-- 1–3 sentences. What changes and *why*? Link the issue: Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] `feat` — new functionality
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — no behavior change
- [ ] `perf` — performance improvement
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `test` — tests only
- [ ] `chore` / `build` / `ci` — tooling, deps, pipelines
- [ ] **Breaking change** (describe migration path below)

## Test plan

<!-- How was this verified? Reviewers should be able to repeat these steps.
Reference specific commands, fixtures, or environments. -->

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm test -- --run`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run size:check` (if bundling-relevant)
- [ ] Manual verification: <!-- steps -->

## Screenshots / recordings

<!-- For UI changes. Before / after, or a short clip. Delete if not UI. -->

## Risk & rollout

<!-- Anything reviewers should worry about?
Migrations, env-var changes, feature flags, persisted-state shape, etc.
If a rollback isn't trivial, say so. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch follows naming convention (`<type>/<short-kebab>`)
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits (or will squash to one that does)
- [ ] CI is green
- [ ] Docs updated where behavior changed (README, env vars, `audit.md`, etc.)
- [ ] No new secrets, API keys, or PII committed
